user_prompt: Don't include the refund link in the response, the customer didn't ask for one. Try again.
actual_output:
I understand. I will adjust the response to focus on the customer's specific request without including the refund link.

Please provide the details of the ticket you would like me to draft a response for, and I will be happy to assist.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly acknowledged the user's instruction to modify the response format and offered to proceed with the task once the ticket details were provided.
